reviewer: agent matrix pass (revision 2) — headless Chrome, real inference + mobile/desktop screenshots read

rubric.notes: auto-checkable parts pass;AGENT VERDICT: first-visit Download → real output "😮 surprise" (96.8%) in 76 ms on WASM; 7 softmax scores sum to 1.00; cached reload auto-inits to ready with only "Clear cached model" (no Download button); console + network clean (headless Chrome). the see-inside 7-axis emotion wheel (radar) + ranked bar chart render with all 7 Ekman labels legible (viewBox padded so no label clips); light + dark both pass.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference runs off the main thread via a Web Worker (or MediaPipe delegate); control UI stays responsive.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: verify — responsive-desktop/mobile conformance assertions checked (see rubric).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Flexbox with flex-wrap + min-inline-size:0; auto-fit minmax() grids; logical properties; wrap wide viz in overflow-x:auto — no fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — controls-grid/wheel-wrap/compare use repeat(auto-fit,minmax()); .msg uses flex:1 1 200px + min-inline-size:0; the SVG wheel/arc use a viewBox and max-inline-size (arc wrapped in overflow-x:auto).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check: desktop+mobile no horizontal overflow, console+network clean; screenshots reports/responsive/screens/emotion-classification/

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce load/inference state in a role=status aria-live region; every control labelled + keyboard operable; SVG viz has role=img + aria-label.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — shared loader status is role=status aria-live=polite; textarea/range/buttons labelled; renderRadar sets role=img + aria-label naming the winner.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Associate visible labels with textarea/range controls; keep sample chips real focusable buttons.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — every input has an associated <label>; sample chips are <button type=button>; threshold slider shows its live value.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless run drove chips + slider; conformance controls checks pass

openQuestions: Long-form INP under sustained as-you-type typing on low-end mobile is only spot-checked (debounced + off-thread) — worth a field INP trace.
Deadpan/context-dependent irony is inherently uncertain (text has no tone); is surfacing the 50/50 uncertainty clear enough to users?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU fast-path option for emotion-classification (dtype q4f16) with honest WASM fallback, for larger batch/arc workloads.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for emotion-classification (text-classification, wasm): real on-device inference verified in headless Chrome (winner "surprise"), cached auto-init confirmed (no Load button), mobile+desktop screenshots read (no overflow, legible, links wrap), light+dark checked. All rubric dimensions evidenced; support flipped to ok.
